title: Pilot Beszel monitoring before Grafana
goal: Pilot Beszel as the first lightweight Heim-PC/service monitoring layer and use the result to decide whether Grafana remains unnecessary.

acceptance.assertion: Beszel server/agent placement, port binding and persistence path are documented before install.
The first monitored scope includes CPU, RAM, disk, network and Docker/container state where available.
Beszel remains observation-only and cannot restart services, mutate Bureau queue state, merge PRs or deploy.
The Grafana task remains deferred unless Beszel fails a concrete monitoring requirement.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
validation: Beszel hub HTTP smoke returned 200 on 2026-07-09.
Agent container heim-util-beszel-agent is running from henrygd/beszel-agent:latest.
Agent log reports WebSocket connected host=127.0.0.1:8090.
WAL-aware read-only Beszel database check reports systems=1, system_stats>=44, container_stats>=44, containers=11, system_details=1.
Monitored system row is name=heim-pc, host=/beszel_socket/beszel.sock, status=up.
Screenshot from Beszel UI shows heim-pc with CPU, memory, disk, GPU, load, network and temperature columns populated.
metadata.runtime_evidence: heimgewebe/infra runtime/local-utility-endstate-2026-07-09.md and heimgewebe/heim-pc runtime/software-inventory.md after Beszel monitoring closeout

verification.source_ref: heimgewebe/infra runtime/local-utility-endstate-2026-07-09.md and heimgewebe/heim-pc runtime/software-inventory.md after Beszel monitoring closeout
